title: Debug terminal subagent grid not showing

log.context: Debug terminal subagent grid not showing

Service is up. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** In `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py`, the browser-side JavaScript had `const CLUNGER_BASE = 'http://localhost:8081'`. When the browser loaded `terminal.clung.us`, that JS ran on the user's machine and tried to reach `localhost:8081` on the *user's* machine — which doesn't exist there. The clunger API is only on the server.

**Fix:** Changed `CLUNGER_BASE` to `'https://clung.us'` so the browser JS calls `https://clung.us/api/subagents` — the public...(truncated)
